entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the crop species

entities.name: ICCL80074
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea derived from a 3-way cross

entities.name: KRANTHI
entities.description: The released name for chickpea variety ICCL80074

entities.name: ANNIGERI
entities.description: A chickpea variety used as a comparison in yield trials

entities.name: JYOTHI
entities.description: A local chickpea variety used as a comparison in farmers' fields

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The Indian state where ICCL80074 was released and tested

entities.name: 3-WAY CROSS
entities.description: The breeding method used to derive ICCL80074 from P481, JG62, and P1630

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The physical growth form of the plant, described as semispreading with an upright habit

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach maturity, approximately 100 days

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: SEED COLOR
entities.description: The visual appearance of the seeds, described as light brown and attractive

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, measured at 18.6 g

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the seeds, measured at 20.6%

entities.name: SUGAR CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of sugar in the seeds, measured at 6.0%

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of iron in the seeds, measured at 9.6%

entities.name: PROTEIN DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The percentage of seed protein that is digestible, measured at 64.7%

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes wilt in chickpea

entities.name: ROOT ROTS
entities.description: Diseases affecting the root system of the plant

entities.name: HELICOVERPA
entities.description: A pest insect that causes pod damage in chickpea

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist race 1 of Fusarium oxysporum

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO ROOT ROTS
entities.description: The ability of the plant to tolerate root rot conditions

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO HELICOVERPA
entities.description: The ability of the plant to reduce pod damage caused by Helicoverpa
